jd_text: To lead, govern, and scale the organization’s artificial intelligence and advanced analytics capabilities by defining strategic direction, overseeing enterprise-wide AI and data initiatives, enabling data-driven decision-making, and ensuring responsible, secure, and compliant use of AI in alignment with organizational and national priorities. Translate strategic direction into executable AI and analytics plans Prioritize and manage AI and analytics use cases within approved scope Oversee analytics platforms, tools, and data pipelines Ensure alignment between AI delivery teams and business needs Track performance and benefits realization of AI initiatives Oversee the delivery of AI and analytics programs and projects Ensure availability, quality, and reliability of data and analytics outputs Monitor performance of AI models, platforms, and analytics solutions Ensure effective coordination between AI engineers, data scientists, and business teams Resolve operational risks and escalations related to AI initiatives Contribute to the development and refinement of the organization’s AI & Analytics strategy, priorities, and roadmap under the direction of the AI Executive Director. Lead strategic analysis to identify high-value AI opportunities, quantify expected benefits (cost, efficiency, risk reduction), and recommend use-case prioritization. Provide strategic input on AI investment planning (platforms, data capabilities, tooling), including business cases and resource requirements. Monitor AI and analytics trends and assess applicability to the organization, proposing innovations and capability enhancements aligned with national and organizational priorities. Ensure AI and analytics initiatives are aligned with enterprise strategy, operational needs, and performance objectives, and that outcomes are translated into measurable value realization. Support the AI Executive Director with strategic briefings, executive dashboards, and decision-support packs for leadership committees.
